title: Ganesh Aarti
intro: An aarti dedicated to Lord Ganesha, sung at the beginning of every auspicious task.
description:
|| Ganesh Aarti ||
Jai Ganesh Jai Ganesh, Jai Ganesh Deva.
Mata jaki Parvati, Pita Mahadeva.
meaning: This aarti praises Lord Ganesha, the remover of obstacles, and invokes auspiciousness.

faq.q1: When is the Ganesh Aarti sung?
faq.a1: At the start of any auspicious task or worship, and on Wednesdays.
faq.q2: What is dear to Lord Ganesha?
faq.a2: Modak and durva grass are especially dear to Lord Ganesha.
